'''dochanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:gynaecogenic|gynaecogenic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gynaecogenic|gynaecogenic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dochanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochanithi|dochanithi]] || [[word:dochaniji|dochaniji]] || [[word:dochanishi|dochanishi]] || [[word:dochaniki|dochaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochanuthuthu|dochanuthuthu]] || [[word:dochanujuju|dochanujuju]] || [[word:dochanushushu|dochanushushu]] || [[word:dochanukuku|dochanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochanuthu|dochanuthu]] || [[word:dochanuju|dochanuju]] || [[word:dochanushu|dochanushu]] || [[word:dochanuku|dochanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochanufthuf|dochanufthuf]] || [[word:dochanufjuf|dochanufjuf]] || [[word:dochanufshuf|dochanufshuf]] || [[word:dochanufkuf|dochanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochanethe|dochanethe]] || [[word:dochaneje|dochaneje]] || [[word:dochaneshe|dochaneshe]] || [[word:dochaneke|dochaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochanothotho|dochanothotho]] || [[word:dochanojojo|dochanojojo]] || [[word:dochanoshosho|dochanoshosho]] || [[word:dochanokoko|dochanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochanotho|dochanotho]] || [[word:dochanojo|dochanojo]] || [[word:dochanosho|dochanosho]] || [[word:dochanoko|dochanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochanofthof|dochanofthof]] || [[word:dochanofjof|dochanofjof]] || [[word:dochanofshof|dochanofshof]] || [[word:dochanofkof|dochanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochanïfthïf|dochanïfthïf]] || [[word:dochanïfjïf|dochanïfjïf]] || [[word:dochanïfshïf|dochanïfshïf]] || [[word:dochanïfkïf|dochanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochanïfthïfthïf|dochanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dochanïfjïfjïf|dochanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dochanïfshïfshïf|dochanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dochanïfkïfkïf|dochanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochanïfthïf|dochanïfthïf]] || [[word:dochanïfjïf|dochanïfjïf]] || [[word:dochanïfshïf|dochanïfshïf]] || [[word:dochanïfkïf|dochanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochanïfthïf|dochanïfthïf]] || [[word:dochanïfjïf|dochanïfjïf]] || [[word:dochanïfshïf|dochanïfshïf]] || [[word:dochanïfkïf|dochanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochanæthæ|dochanæthæ]] || [[word:dochanæjæ|dochanæjæ]] || [[word:dochanæshæ|dochanæshæ]] || [[word:dochanækæ|dochanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochanathatha|dochanathatha]] || [[word:dochanajaja|dochanajaja]] || [[word:dochanashasha|dochanashasha]] || [[word:dochanakaka|dochanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochanatha|dochanatha]] || [[word:dochanaja|dochanaja]] || [[word:dochanasha|dochanasha]] || [[word:dochanaka|dochanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochanafthaf|dochanafthaf]] || [[word:dochanafjaf|dochanafjaf]] || [[word:dochanafshaf|dochanafshaf]] || [[word:dochanafkaf|dochanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dochanasha|dochanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochanshësha|dochanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochanrosha|dochanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochanmusha|dochanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochanyasha|dochanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochankshësha|godochankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochankrosha|godochankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochankmusha|godochankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochankyasha|godochankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dochachanasha|dochachanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochachanshësha|dochachanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochachanrosha|dochachanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochachanmusha|dochachanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochachanyasha|dochachanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochachankshësha|godochachankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochachankrosha|godochachankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochachankmusha|godochachankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochachankyasha|godochachankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dechænasha|dechænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dechænshësha|dechænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dechænrosha|dechænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dechænmusha|dechænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dechænyasha|dechænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godechænkshësha|godechænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godechænkrosha|godechænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godechænkmusha|godechænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godechænkyasha|godechænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dochfanasha|dochfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochfanshësha|dochfanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochfanrosha|dochfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochfanmusha|dochfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochfanyasha|dochfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochfankshësha|godochfankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochfankrosha|godochfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochfankmusha|godochfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochfankyasha|godochfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
